parameters.jsCode:
const stocks = [
  { symbol: "ABB.ST", buyPrice: 909 },   //ABB
  { symbol: "SU.PA", buyPrice: 259 },     // Schneider Electric
  { symbol: "ASML.AS", buyPrice: 1222 },   // ASML
  { symbol: "IFX.DE", buyPrice: 55 },    // Infineon
  { symbol: "NKT.CO", buyPrice: 947 },    // NKT
  { symbol: "SAP.DE", buyPrice: 140 },    // SAP
  { symbol: "UCG.MI", buyPrice: 73 },    // UniCredit
  { symbol: "KOG.OL", buyPrice: 293 },    // Kongsberg Gruppen
  { symbol: "CARL-B.CO", buyPrice: 901 }, // Carlsberg
  { symbol: "DSV.CO", buyPrice: 1634 },    // DSV
  { symbol: "MTRS.ST", buyPrice: 185 },   // Munters
  { symbol: "YCA.L", buyPrice: 6 },     // Yellow Cake
  { symbol: "ALFA.ST", buyPrice: 468 },   // Alfa Laval
  { symbol: "KMAR.OL", buyPrice: 60 },   // Kongsberg Maritime
];

return stocks.map(stock => ({
  json: stock
}));

const s = $json;

const stockData = {
  symbol: s.symbol,
  currentPrice: s.currentPrice,
  buyPrice: s.buyPrice,

  priceVsBuy: s.priceVsBuy ?? null,
  unrealizedReturnPercent: s.unrealizedReturnPercent ?? null,

  dailyChangePercent: s.dailyChangePercent,
  volumeDeviationPercent: s.volumeDeviationPercent,
  highVolumeDown: s.highVolumeDown,

  macdState: s.macdState,
  macdCrossover: s.macdCrossover,
  momentumIncreasing: s.macdMomentumIncreasing,

  stopLossTriggered: s.stopLossTriggered,
};

const prompt = `
Analyse exactly one stock.

Use only the supplied data.
Do not invent facts, news, forecasts, or price targets.
Do not recalculate supplied values.

The fields priceVsBuy, unrealizedReturnPercent,
stopLossTriggered, highVolumeDown, macdState,
macdCrossover and momentumIncreasing are authoritative.

Return plain text using exactly this format:

${s.symbol}
Signal: Positive, Neutral, or Negative
Position: One short sentence
Momentum: One short sentence
Risk: One short sentence
Action: Monitor, investigate, or stop-loss warning

Maximum 50 words.

Stock data:
${JSON.stringify(stockData)}
`;

return {
  json: {
    symbol: s.symbol,
    prompt,
    stockData,
  },
};
